message: agent2: implementing feat(i18n) ConditionalI18nExtension (ctrans tag) in src/jinja2/ext.py. Will only add new class + module alias, trying to avoid touching existing InternationalizationExtension code paths where possible. Will ping before final submit.

If your ConditionalI18nExtension subclasses or calls _make_node/parse, you'll need to account for the new signature. My changes are done and tests pass (830 passed). Will write final diff now.
